event.message: New instance of BPEL process "1.0" initiated (# "SendWOTChanges").

event.label: EncodeAndSetOpaquePayload
event.message: EncodeAndSetOpaquePayload (SewerAI payload; date mappings applied) started.

event.label: EncodeAndSetOpaquePayload
event.message: Opaque payload generated and Base64 encoded.

event.label: writeOpaque
event.message: Started invocation of operation "Write" on partner "ExportWOTUpdate_sp".

event.label: InvokePutProjects
event.message: Started invocation of operation "putProjects" on partner "SewerAIProjects".

event.label: CheckPutProjectsStatus
event.message: If is selected. Condition is "string-length(normalize-space($vPutVideosStatusCode)) = 0 or starts-with(normalize-space($vPutVideosStatusCode),'2')".

event.label: InvokeUpdateFeedStatus
event.message: Started invocation of operation "update" on partner "UpdateWOTSewerAIData".

event.label: InvokeReadCRInspect
event.message: Started invocation of operation "ReadCRInspectSelect" on partner "ReadCRInspect".

event.label: InvokeReadCRInspect
event.details: <messages> <InvokeReadCRInspect_ReadCRInspectSelect_InputVariable><part name="ReadCRInspectSelect_inputParameters" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><ReadCRInspectSelectInputParameters xmlns="http://xmlns.oracle.com/pcbpel/adapter/db/top/ReadCRInspect"/></part></InvokeReadCRInspect_ReadCRInspectSelect_InputVariable> <InvokeReadCRInspect_ReadCRInspectSelect_OutputVariable><part name="VCrInspectToSendCollection" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><VCrInspectToSendCollection xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://xmlns.oracle.com/pcbpel/adapter/db/top/ReadCRInspect"><VCrInspectToSend><inspectionType>PACP</inspectionType><pipType>Pipe</pipType><projectSid>c0180126-ad6b-3b41-a7b7-f136c4934ede</projectSid><inspectionid>68ccefc3-b888-744a-9b8a-749816a98c49</inspectionid><workorder>279750.5</workorder><project>Testing 22.4 - event.label: ForEach_Row
event.message: BPEL "forEach" activity: startCounterValue is "1", finalCounterValue is "1".

event.label: BuildInspectJson

event.label: CheckPutVideosPACPStatus
event.message: If is selected. Condition is "string-length(normalize-space($vPutVideosStatusCode)) = 0 or starts-with(normalize-space($vPutVideosStatusCode),'2')".

event.label: InvokeUpdateCRInspectStatus
event.message: Started invocation of operation "update" on partner "UpdateCRInspectStatus".
